posts.role: Post 2: Carousel — educational (what affects your payout)
posts.caption: Three things decide your payout: condition, storage, and lock status. We break it all down so you know exactly what to expect before you ship. Start your quote at purchasingcorp.com/form.

fields.body_html: Flawless means zero scratches, no dents, perfect glass. Good allows minor wear. Cracked screens or bent frames drop the number — be honest and you'll never be surprised.
A 1TB iPhone pays hundreds more than 256GB. Same device, different capacity, different payout. Check your model specs before you quote.
Carrier-locked phones limit resale. If you're still paying it off or it's tied to a contract, settle that first or expect a lower offer. Find My must be off, too.

fields.headline_html: You get a real number, not a range
fields.body_html: Answer six questions, get your exact cash offer. No vague 'up to' nonsense. If the device matches your description, that's what we pay. Same day.
